1.description: resolve kommunenummer and boundary for Kristiansand

2.description: select buildings (id+geom) in the municipality and compute bbox

3.description: select 200-year stormflo features intersecting municipality bbox

4.description: select flood zone features intersecting municipality bbox

6.description: filter those buildings to also intersect flood zones

7.description: select bygningid, sort by bygningid asc and limit 10

candidates.database_description: Storm-surge and sea-level-rise hazard data showing coastal inundation areas for different return periods and future sea-level scenarios. Useful for coastal flood exposure analysis and scenario-based hazard assessment.

Building and cadastral building data from Matrikkelen, including building points (representasjonspunkt), building type, building number, current building status, municipality attributes, and identifiers for linking buildings to addresses and properties.
Flood hazard susceptibility data showing areas with potential flood risk. Suitable for first-pass flood exposure analysis, municipality-level planning, and spatial overlay with buildings and parcels.
Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.

1.sql: SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%';

2.sql: SELECT bygningid, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

3.sql: SELECT objid, omrade FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT ST_Envelope(omrade) FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer='4204'));

1.description: resolve kommunenummer and boundary for Kristiansand

2.description: select buildings in Kristiansand by kommunenummer

4.description: find buildings that intersect storm-surge areas

6.description: find buildings that intersect both storm-surge and flood zones

candidates.database_description: Storm-surge and sea-level-rise hazard data showing coastal inundation areas for different return periods and future sea-level scenarios. Useful for coastal flood exposure analysis and scenario-based hazard assessment.

Building and cadastral building data from Matrikkelen, including building points (representasjonspunkt), building type, building number, current building status, municipality attributes, and identifiers for linking buildings to addresses and properties.
Flood hazard susceptibility data showing areas with potential flood risk. Suitable for first-pass flood exposure analysis, municipality-level planning, and spatial overlay with buildings and parcels.
Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.
